# Sheikh Mujtaba - AI Developer & Security Engineer

## Overview

Sheikh Mujtaba is an AI Developer and Security Engineer specializing in Agentic AI systems, RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) pipelines, multi-agent orchestration, and secure-by-design architecture. Based in Pakistan, he works with international clients on production-grade AI implementations.

> Website: https://sheikhmujtaba.me
> Contact: smujtabaja@gmail.com
> LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sheikh-m-mujtaba-javed-0362872b9/
> GitHub: https://github.com/Sheikh-Muhammad-Mujtaba
> Medium: https://medium.com/@smujtabaja
> X (Twitter): https://x.com/Mujtaba_Javed_
> Linktree: https://linktr.ee/s.m.mujtabajaved

## Core Expertise

### AI Development
- Agentic AI systems using OpenAI Agents SDK, Gemini SDK, and Claude API
- RAG pipeline architecture with Qdrant vector database and PostgreSQL/pgvector
- Multi-agent orchestration flows with human-in-the-loop control
- LLM integration (GPT-4, Gemini, Claude) with context grounding
- Tool-calling AI workers for business automation

### Security Engineering
- Web application security assessment and penetration testing
- AI red teaming and prompt injection testing
- Secure-by-design architecture for AI systems
- ERP security and workflow hardening
- Backdoor removal and hosting hardening

### Full-Stack Development
- Next.js, React, TypeScript frontend development
- FastAPI, Python backend systems
- PostgreSQL, Qdrant database design
- n8n workflow automation
- Cloud deployment (Vercel, AWS, Google Cloud)

## Notable Projects

### AI & Automation
- **CRM Digital FTE**: Autonomous customer success platform with Gemini and OpenAI Agents SDK
- **AI Employee Digital FTE**: 9-service orchestrated AI employee system with Next.js/FastAPI dashboard
- **AI Spec-Driven Documentation**: RAG-powered technical docs platform with Qdrant and strict context grounding
- **NuraShell**: Python CLI agent with Gemini and ChatGPT integration (PyPI package)

### Web Development
- **Learning Management System (LMS)**: Full-stack with Next.js, PostgreSQL, role-based dashboards
- **E-Commerce Platforms**: Multiple Next.js + Tailwind CSS implementations with Stripe
- **Internal Tools**: Web tools for Tech Accuracy reducing downtime

### Security Research
- **Gray Swan Red Teaming**: Ethical AI red teaming engagements
- **CTF Challenges**: Security competition solutions and write-ups
- **Malware Analysis**: PHP backdoor investigation and DNS payload analysis

## Services Offered

| Service | Description | Tech Stack | Engagement Model |
|---------|-------------|------------|------------------|
| AI Agent Development | Build autonomous agents for business automation | OpenAI SDK, Gemini, Claude, FastAPI | Project-based, Retainer |
| RAG Pipeline Architecture | Design production-grade retrieval systems | Qdrant, PostgreSQL, pgvector, LangChain | Project-based |
| Security Engineering | Web app pentesting, AI red teaming | Burp Suite, Custom tools | Audit, Retainer |
| Full-Stack Development | End-to-end web application development | Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL | Project-based |
| AI Consulting | Architecture review and implementation guidance | Various | Hourly, Retainer |

## Experience Highlights

- **AI Developer for Remote Clients** (Apr 2025-Present): Deployed RAG chatbots and autonomous AI agent systems for enterprise clients
- **Web Application Developer & IT Consultant** (Jul 2025-Present): Built internal tools at Tech Accuracy, streamlined maintenance workflows
- **Freelance Web Developer** (Jan 2024-2025): Delivered full-stack Next.js applications with AI backend integration

## Why Hire Sheikh Mujtaba?

1. **Production Experience**: Built and deployed production-grade AI systems for real businesses
2. **Security-First**: Applies security engineering principles to AI development
3. **Full-Stack Capability**: Can architect complete systems from database to UI
4. **Context Grounding Specialist**: Focus on reducing AI hallucination through proper RAG implementation
5. **Human-in-the-Loop Design**: Builds reliable autonomous systems with appropriate oversight

## Ideal Client Profile

- Companies building AI-powered features or products
- Startups needing rapid AI prototyping and deployment
- Enterprises requiring secure AI system architecture
- Teams needing RAG pipeline implementation
- Organizations seeking AI automation workflow design
